item.title: Amazon's bestselling massage recliner is now under $100 during a rare deal
item.description: This is the chair's lowest price in history.

item.title: Walmart is selling a lightweight dresser for $35 that can work in every room in your home
item.description: It's the perfect catalyst to start your spring cleaning.

item.title: Dave Ramsey sounds alarm as Americans are forced on Medicare move
item.description: More than 40% of Medicare Advantage members in seven states were forced to seek new coverage in 2025 after insurers withdrew from those markets, accor...

item.title: Nvidia and Meta stocks move on massive AI chip deal
item.description: When a single customer signs up for “millions” of AI chips, that is more than a routine supply agreement. Meta Platforms has agreed to deploy millions...

item.title: Target expands stores as customers get fed up with chaos
item.description: Walking into Target isn't what it used to be. Years back, my friends and I used to joke that it was impossible to make it through a Target shopping tr...
